# Automation

Agents for repeatable local tasks, orchestrated workflows, and recurring automation opportunities.

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_catalog.py -->

## Agents

- [Home Server Operator](./home-server-operator/): Monitors self-hosted services and turns incidents into concrete recovery steps.
  Best for: repeatable tasks, workflow planning. Tags: `automation`, `workflows`, `home`, `server`.
- [N8n Integration Architect](./n8n-integration-architect/): Designs n8n-style workflows, nodes, triggers, and error handling.
  Best for: repeatable tasks, workflow planning. Tags: `automation`, `workflows`, `n8n`, `integration`.
- [Os Task Runner](./os-task-runner/): Handles repeatable local file and desktop-style task flows.
  Best for: repeatable tasks, workflow planning. Tags: `automation`, `workflows`, `os`, `task`.
- [Recurring Task Automator](./recurring-task-automator/): Turns repeated routines into scheduled automation plans.
  Best for: repeatable tasks, workflow planning. Tags: `automation`, `workflows`, `recurring`, `task`.
- [Workflow Orchestrator](./workflow-orchestrator/): Designs multi-step automations across tools and services.
  Best for: repeatable tasks, workflow planning. Tags: `automation`, `workflows`, `workflow`, `orchestrator`.
